---
title: "Ordinal Regression"
crossref:
  lst-title: "🎯 Checkpoint 3."
  lst-labels: alpha a
format: live-html
sidebar: lesson-6
---

```{pyodide}
#| include: false
import warnings
from IPython.display import display, HTML

def show_ripeness_prediction():
    betas   = [3.77469277, -11.64409419, 3.7974283]
    thresh  = [-12.89042093, -9.10418188, -2.23403378, 4.35069484, 8.54085104]
    xmean   = [200.04761905, 117.0952381, 37.0]
    xstd    = [41.12869024, 54.21465692, 27.23792874]

    srcdoc = f"""<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-latest.min.js"></script>
<style>
body {{ font-family: sans-serif; margin: 14px; }}
.row {{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 10px; }}
label {{ font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold; width: 30px; }}
input[type=number] {{
  font-size: 15px; width: 90px; padding: 5px 8px;
  border: 2px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;
}}
#swatch {{
  width: 60px; height: 40px; border-radius: 6px;
  border: 2px solid #888; display: inline-block;
}}
#result {{
  font-size: 17px; color: navy; font-weight: bold; margin: 6px 0 0 2px;
}}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<p style="margin-bottom:12px;font-size:15px;">
  Enter R, G, and B values (0&ndash;255) to predict tomato ripeness stage (1&ndash;6).
</p>

<div class="row">
  <label style="color:crimson;">R:</label>
  <input type="number" id="inR" value="200" min="0" max="255" step="1" oninput="upd()">
  <label style="color:green;">G:</label>
  <input type="number" id="inG" value="117" min="0" max="255" step="1" oninput="upd()">
  <label style="color:dodgerblue;">B:</label>
  <input type="number" id="inB" value="37" min="0" max="255" step="1" oninput="upd()">
  <span id="swatch"></span>
</div>

<div id="chart"></div>
<div id="result"></div>

<script>
var betas  = {betas};
var thresh = {thresh};
var xmean  = {xmean};
var xstd   = {xstd};
var stageColors = ["#2d6a2d","#6abf3a","#c8d42a","#f0a500","#e85d04","#9b1b1b"];

function clamp(v){{ return Math.min(255, Math.max(0, isNaN(v) ? 0 : v)); }}

function predict(R, G, B){{
  var z = [(R-xmean[0])/xstd[0], (G-xmean[1])/xstd[1], (B-xmean[2])/xstd[2]];
  var eta = betas[0]*z[0] + betas[1]*z[1] + betas[2]*z[2];
  var cum = thresh.map(function(t){{ return 1/(1+Math.exp(-(t-eta))); }});
  var p = [cum[0]];
  for(var k=1;k<5;k++) p.push(cum[k]-cum[k-1]);
  p.push(1-cum[4]);
  return p;
}}

var initP = predict(200, 117, 37);
Plotly.newPlot("chart", [{{
  type: "bar",
  x: ["Stage 1","Stage 2","Stage 3","Stage 4","Stage 5","Stage 6"],
  y: initP,
  marker: {{ color: stageColors }},
  hovertemplate: "%{{x}}: %{{y:.1%}}<extra></extra>"
}}], {{
  xaxis: {{ title: "Ripeness Stage" }},
  yaxis: {{ title: "Probability", range: [0, 1], tickformat: ".0%" }},
  margin: {{ t: 20, b: 50, l: 60, r: 20 }},
  height: 300
}}, {{responsive: true}});

function upd(){{
  var R=clamp(parseFloat(document.getElementById("inR").value));
  var G=clamp(parseFloat(document.getElementById("inG").value));
  var B=clamp(parseFloat(document.getElementById("inB").value));
  var p = predict(R, G, B);
  var best = p.indexOf(Math.max.apply(null, p));
  document.getElementById("swatch").style.background =
    "rgb("+Math.round(R)+","+Math.round(G)+","+Math.round(B)+")";
  document.getElementById("result").textContent =
    "Most likely stage: " + (best+1) + " (" + (p[best]*100).toFixed(1) + "% probability)";
  Plotly.update("chart", {{ y: [p] }}, {{}}, [0]);
}}
upd();
</script>
</body>
</html>"""

    with warnings.catch_warnings():
        warnings.simplefilter("ignore", UserWarning)
        display(HTML(
            '<iframe srcdoc="{}" width="100%" height="480" '
            'frameborder="0" style="border:none;"></iframe>'.format(
                srcdoc.replace('"', '&quot;')
            )
        ))
```

```{pyodide}
show_ripeness_prediction()
```
